title: core: enforce webhook payload size limit
body:
## Description
Fixes #42.

Problem: oversized webhook bodies could keep the local review server busy before signature handling completed. This change rejects payloads above the documented limit and keeps the error path explicit for maintainers.

## Linked issue
Fixes #42.

## Tests
Verification: npm test passed locally and covered the oversized-payload path.

## Risk
Risk is low because the limit already existed in the request reader; this only makes the policy visible and tested.

Signed-off-by: Jane Maintainer <jane@example.org>

repositoryFiles.content: Every pull request must link an issue, include tests or verification, and use a Signed-off-by line for DCO accountability.
